name: Vegetable Lasagna "Curls
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cook lasagna noodles in a large saucepan until tender but firm, 8-10 minutes. Drain, rinse and keep in cold water until ready to use.
3. Mix remaining ingredients (tofu cottage cheese, broccoli florets, mushrooms, green onions, basil, oregano, parsley) in a medium-sized bowl.
4. Place one-twelfth of the mixture on each lasagna noodle and roll up to enclose filling.
5. Spray baking dish with nonstick cooking spray and place rolls seam-side down in dish.
6. Cover with marinara sauce and bake for 20 minutes, covered. Remove cover and bake for another 20 minutes.
7. Sprinkle with nutritional yeast flakes.
